base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of characters — a character (playable) from 1990 dr mario. Dr. Mario animations (pill-throw pose × 4 tempos) + 3 Virus mascots (Red Fever/Blue Chill/Yellow Weird) idle-wiggle + defeated-pose. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dr. Mario animations (pill-throw pose × 4 tempos) + 3 Virus mascots (Red Fever/Blue Chill/Yellow Weird) idle-wiggle + defeated-pose
